_provenance.captured_against: synthetic / hand-authored to match the schema we parse
_provenance.note: Tastytrade wraps every payload in a top-level {"data": {...}, "context": str}. The TastytradeVenue.get_balance() reads data.cash-balance / data.equity-buying-power / data.net-liquidating-value, with hyphenated keys. The numeric values arrive as STRINGS (typed in the API as decimals) -- the venue's float() coercion handles that. M4 closure (v0.1.68) -- this fixture pins that the wrapper layer + hyphenated keys + string-typed numerics all stay parseable. A future API change to camelCase, snake_case, or float-typed values would surface as a fixture-replay test failure.
